label: Germany-Federal
text:
BattDG — Batterierecht-Durchführungsgesetz (Germany)

German federal act implementing EU battery rules (BattDG). Covers national registration, due diligence, and collection obligations alongside Regulation (EU) 2023/1542.

Official source: https://www.gesetze-im-internet.de/battdg/
(Full HTML available at gesetze-im-internet.de — fetch via national portal or DIP.)
title: BattDG — Batterierecht-Durchführungsgesetz (Germany)
